metadata.description: Professional Chinese writing assistance based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with strict anti-AI-taste enforcement.

plugins.name: writing-polish
plugins.description: Coaches, drafts, polishes, and audits Chinese documents based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然). v6.1: Evaluator-Optimizer 范式 (clean-context reviewer 默认必跑兜底); 0-3 scoring scale + Unknown 逃生舱; L2 self-judge 文件留痕兜底; anchor/eval 物理隔离防 Grader Gaming. Modes: coach / polish / audit. Strictly enforces GB/T 15834 curly quotes, blocks 公文黑词 (赋能/重塑/闭环/抓手), 元注释 (作为一个 AI 助手), 戏剧化叙事 (三层防御/跑通/翻车). Genres: 公文/讲话稿/调研/述职/汇报/随笔杂文/自媒体/咨询.
